description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular metallic head with a slightly weathered, matte finish and prominent green glowing cracks running across its surface, suggesting a reinforced or possibly electrified design. The head is capped with a brown, circular top and reinforced with metallic rivets along the sides, adding to its industrial appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark purple grip with visible ridges for enhanced hold, and ends in a metallic, faceted pommel. The overall construction appears heavy-duty, suitable for demanding tasks in urban environments such as demolition or construction. The green glowing lines give it a distinctive, almost futuristic or high-tech aesthetic. No visible branding or damage is present, and the hammer appears solid and well-crafted.
description: A heavy, rectangular metallic hammer with glowing green cracks, a reinforced head, and a ridged purple grip handle, exuding a high-tech, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat face of the hammer head with green glowing cracks and the circular brown cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular head, metallic rivets, and the full length of the purple grip handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite flat face of the head, also marked by green glowing cracks and the brown cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the riveted side of the head and the handle's grip details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a dark purple, ridged rubberized grip for enhanced hold and comfort.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type metallic head with flat striking faces and green glowing cracks, reinforced with side rivets and a brown top cap.
